# FerroUI Contributor License Agreement (CLA)

Thank you for your interest in contributing to FerroUI! This agreement allows us to protect the project and its community.

By signing this agreement, you represent that:

1. Your contribution is your original work.
2. You have the right to grant the licenses below.
3. You grant the FerroUI Project Team a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, no-charge, royalty-free, irrevocable copyright license to reproduce, prepare derivative works of, publicly display, publicly perform, sublicense, and distribute your contributions and such derivative works.

## How to sign

Please reply to the PR comment from the CLA bot with:
`I have read the CLA Document and I hereby sign the CLA`
